subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones in Paran! The All-Merciful remembereth you in these days wherein the Luminary of inner meanings hath dawned from the horizon of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی فی فاران یذکرکم الرحمن فی ایام فیها اشرق نیر المعانی من افق البیان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech, @idolatry, @call to action
